sys_update_xml.name: sp_widget_855f8d8483773610f17e6750ceaad330
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_widget"><sp_widget action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><category>custom</category><client_script><![CDATA[function($scope, $http) {
  var c = this;

  // ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.activeCategory  = null;
  c.activeAction    = null;
  c.loading         = false;
  c.searchQuery     = '';

  // Forms
  c.pullForm   = { network: '' };
  c.addForm    = { name:'', network_cidr:'', owner:'', ip:'', description:'', cidr:'', vlan_id:'' };
  c.editForm   = { name:'', owner:'', description:'' };
  c.editSearch = '';
  c.editSuggestions  = [];
  c.deleteSuggestions = [];
  c.selectedDevice   = null;
  c.deleteTarget     = null;
  c.deleteSearch     = '';

  // Results
  c.pullResults = [];
  c.addResult   = null;
  c.editResult  = null;
  c.deleteResult = null;

  // ── Init ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.server.update().then(function() {
    // data loaded
  });

  // ── Navigation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.openCategory = function(cat) {
    if (c.activeCategory === cat) {
      c.activeCategory = null;
      c.activeAction   = null;
    } else {
      c.activeCategory = cat;
      c.activeAction   = null;
      c.resetAll();
    }
  };

  c.setAction = function(action) {
    c.activeAction = action;
    c.resetAll();
  };

  c.getCategoryClass = function() {
    var map = { Network:'ap-blue', Computer:'ap-green', Server:'ap-violet', Router:'ap-amber' };
    return map[c.activeCategory] || 'ap-blue';
  };

  c.getNamePlaceholder = function() {
    var map = {
      Computer: 'ws-markoi-pc',
      Server:   'sn-app-server01',
      Router:   'rtr-edge-01',
      Network:  'Dev VLAN 30'
    };
    return map[c.activeCategory] || 'device-name-01';
  };

  c.resetAll = function() {
    c.pullResults      = [];
    c.addResult        = null;
    c.editResult       = null;
    c.deleteResult     = null;
    c.selectedDevice   = null;
    c.deleteTarget     = null;
    c.editSearch       = '';
    c.deleteSearch     = '';
    c.editSuggestions  = [];
    c.deleteSuggestions = [];
    c.addForm = { name:'', network_cidr:'', owner:'', ip:'', description:'', cidr:'', vlan_id:'' };
  };

  c.resetForm    = function() { c.addForm = { name:'', network_cidr:'', owner:'', ip:'', description:'', cidr:'', vlan_id:'' }; c.addResult = null; };
  c.clearSelection     = function() { c.selectedDevice = null; c.editSearch = ''; c.editSuggestions = []; c.editResult = null; };
  c.clearDeleteSelection = function() { c.deleteTarget = null; c.deleteSearch = ''; c.deleteSuggestions = []; c.deleteResult = null; };

  // ── PULL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.doPull = function() {
    c.loading = true;
    c.pullResults = [];
    c.server.get({
      action:      'pull',
      device_type: c.activeCategory,
      network:     c.pullForm.network
    }).then(function(r) {
      c.pullResults = r.data.devices || [];
      c.loading = false;
    });
  };

  // ── ADD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.doAdd = function() {
    if (!c.addForm.name) return;
    c.loading   = true;
    c.addResult = null;
    c.server.get({
      action:      'add',
      device_type: c.activeCategory,
      form:        JSON.stringify(c.addForm)
    }).then(function(r) {
      c.addResult = r.data.result;
      c.loading   = false;
      if (c.addResult && c.addResult.success) {
        c.addForm = { name:'', network_cidr:'', owner:'', ip:'', description:'', cidr:'', vlan_id:'' };
      }
    });
  };

  // ── EDIT autosuggest ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.onEditSearch = function() {
    if (c.editSearch.length < 2) { c.editSuggestions = []; return; }
    c.server.get({
      action:      'search',
      query:       c.editSearch,
      device_type: c.activeCategory
    }).then(function(r) {
      c.editSuggestions = r.data.devices || [];
    });
  };

  c.selectEditDevice = function(dev) {
    c.selectedDevice   = dev;
    c.editSuggestions  = [];
    c.editSearch       = dev.name;
    c.editForm.name        = dev.name;
    c.editForm.owner       = dev.owner || '';
    c.editForm.description = dev.description || '';
    c.editResult = null;
  };

  c.doEdit = function() {
    if (!c.selectedDevice) return;
    c.loading    = true;
    c.editResult = null;
    c.server.get({
      action:     'edit',
      ip_address: c.selectedDevice.ip,
      form:       JSON.stringify(c.editForm)
    }).then(function(r) {
      c.editResult = r.data.result;
      c.loading    = false;
      if (c.editResult && c.editResult.success) {
        c.selectedDevice.name        = c.editForm.name;
        c.selectedDevice.owner       = c.editForm.owner;
        c.selectedDevice.description = c.editForm.description;
      }
    });
  };

  // ── DELETE autosuggest ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  c.onDeleteSearch = function() {
    if (c.deleteSearch.length < 2) { c.deleteSuggestions = []; return; }
    c.server.get({
      action:      'search',
      query:       c.deleteSearch,
      device_type: c.activeCategory
    }).then(function(r) {
      c.deleteSuggestions = r.data.devices || [];
    });
  };

  c.selectDeleteDevice = function(dev) {
    c.deleteTarget      = dev;
    c.deleteSuggestions = [];
    c.deleteSearch      = dev.name;
    c.deleteResult      = null;
  };

  c.doDelete = function() {
    if (!c.deleteTarget) return;
    c.loading      = true;
    c.deleteResult = null;
    c.server.get({
      action:     'delete',
      ip_address: c.deleteTarget.ip,
      sys_id:     c.deleteTarget.sys_id || ''
    }).then(function(r) {
      c.deleteResult = r.data.result;
      c.loading      = false;
      if (c.deleteResult && c.deleteResult.success) {
        c.deleteTarget  = null;
        c.deleteSearch  = '';
      }
    });
  };
}
]]></client_script><controller_as>c</controller_as><css>/* ── Reset & Base ── */
.integrity-home { font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; color: #111827; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 0 60px; }
* { box-sizing: border-box; }

/* ── Hero ── */
.hero { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e2d3d 0%, #1e3a5f 100%); border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 24px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -40px; right: -40px; width: 200px; height: 200px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(37,99,235,.15); }
.hero-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(37,99,235,.25); border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.4); color: #93c5fd; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .1em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
.hero-title { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.hero-sub { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.55); max-width: 420px; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.hero-stats { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; }
.hero-stat { text-align: center; }
.hs-val { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; }
.hs-lbl { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.45); margin-top: 2px; }
.hero-stat-div { width: 1px; height: 32px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.15); }
.hero-visual { position: relative; width: 120px; height: 120px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.hero-ring { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.25); }
.hero-ring-1 { inset: 0; }
.hero-ring-2 { inset: 15px; border-color: rgba(37,99,235,.35); }
.hero-ring-3 { inset: 30px; border-color: rgba(37,99,235,.5); }
.hero-icon-center { position: absolute; inset: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

/* ── Search ── */
.search-section { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.search-wrap { flex: 1; position: relative; }
.search-icon { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); }
.search-inp { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 11px 14px 11px 44px; font-size: 14px; color: #111827; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06); transition: border-color .2s; }
.search-inp:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.08); }
.cejo-status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06); }
.status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; }
.cejo-status.online { color: #15803d; }
.cejo-status.online .status-dot { background: #22c55e; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #22c55e; }
.cejo-status.offline { color: #b91c1c; }
.cejo-status.offline .status-dot { background: #ef4444; }

/* ── Section label ── */
.section-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #9ca3af; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; }

/* ── Category Grid ── */
.category-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.cat-card { background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06); }
.cat-card:hover { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,.12); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.cat-card.active { border-color: #2563eb; background: #eff6ff; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(37,99,235,.15); }
.cat-icon-wrap { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cat-blue { background: #eff6ff; }
.cat-green { background: #f0fdf4; }
.cat-violet { background: #f5f3ff; }
.cat-amber { background: #fffbeb; }
.cat-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 3px; }
.cat-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.cat-count { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #2563eb; }
.cat-arrow { font-size: 20px; color: #d1d5db; margin-left: auto; transition: all .2s; }
.cat-card:hover .cat-arrow, .cat-card.active .cat-arrow { color: #2563eb; transform: translateX(3px); }
.cat-info { flex: 1; }

/* ── Action Panel ── */
.action-panel { background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.08); }
.action-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 18px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; background: #f9fafb; }
.action-panel-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.ap-category-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 20px; }
.ap-blue { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; }
.ap-green { background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; }
.ap-violet { background: #f5f3ff; color: #6d28d9; }
.ap-amber { background: #fffbeb; color: #b45309; }
.ap-close { background: none; border: none; font-size: 18px; color: #9ca3af; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; }
.ap-close:hover { background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151; }

/* ── Action Options ── */
.action-options { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 1px; background: #f3f4f6; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
.action-opt { background: #fff; padding: 18px 20px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; transition: background .15s; position: relative; }
.action-opt:hover { background: #f9fafb; }
.action-opt.selected { background: #eff6ff; }
.action-opt.selected::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: #2563eb; }
.action-opt-danger.selected { background: #fef2f2; }
.action-opt-danger.selected::after { background: #dc2626; }
.ao-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.ao-pull { background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; }
.ao-add { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; }
.ao-edit { background: #fffbeb; color: #d97706; }
.ao-delete { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }
.ao-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; }
.ao-desc { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.4; }
.ao-check { position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; width: 20px; height: 20px; background: #2563eb; color: #fff; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; }
.action-opt-danger .ao-check { background: #dc2626; }

/* ── Form Area ── */
.form-area { padding: 24px; }
.form-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 18px; padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; }
.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
.form-group.full { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
.form-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; }
.form-inp { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #111827; outline: none; transition: border-color .2s; width: 100%; }
.form-inp:focus { border-color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,.08); }
.form-sel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #111827; outline: none; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; }
.form-sel:focus { border-color: #2563eb; }
.form-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 18px; align-items: center; }

/* ── Buttons ── */
.btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 18px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: all .15s; }
.btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; }
.btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .6; cursor: not-allowed; }
.btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #374151; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 18px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all .15s; }
.btn-secondary:hover { background: #f9fafb; }
.btn-danger { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 18px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: all .15s; }
.btn-danger:hover { background: #b91c1c; }
.btn-spin { display: inline-block; width: 12px; height: 12px; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3); border-top-color: #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin .5s linear infinite; }
@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

/* ── Pull Results ── */
.pull-info { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 13px; color: #1e40af; margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1.5; }
.pull-info-icon { font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.pull-results { margin-top: 20px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.pr-header { padding: 10px 14px; background: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
.pr-count { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #374151; }
.pr-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
.pr-table th { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #9ca3af; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; text-align: left; background: #f9fafb; }
.pr-table td { padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; }
.pr-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.pr-table tr:hover td { background: #f9fafb; }

/* ── Autosuggest ── */
.autosuggest-wrap { position: relative; }
.autosuggest-dropdown { position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12); z-index: 100; max-height: 220px; overflow-y: auto; margin-top: 4px; }
.as-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6; font-size: 13px; }
.as-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.as-item:hover { background: #f9fafb; }
.as-ip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #2563eb; margin-left: auto; }
.as-net { font-size: 11px; color: #9ca3af; }

/* ── Selected Device Card ── */
.selected-device-card { background: #f9fafb; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 10px; padding: 18px; margin-top: 14px; }
.sdc-header { margin-bottom: 8px; }
.sdc-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.sdc-badges { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.sdc-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid; }
.sdc-ip { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; border-color: #bfdbfe; font-family: monospace; }
.sdc-mac { background: #f0fdf4; color: #15803d; border-color: #bbf7d0; font-family: monospace; }
.sdc-net { background: #f5f3ff; color: #6d28d9; border-color: #ddd6fe; }

/* ── Delete Preview ── */
.delete-preview { background: #fff8f8; border: 1.5px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 10px; padding: 18px; margin-top: 14px; }
.dp-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 13px; color: #b91c1c; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.dp-details { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.dp-row { display: flex; padding: 9px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #fef2f2; font-size: 13px; }
.dp-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.dp-key { width: 130px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; font-size: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.dp-val { color: #111827; }

/* ── Result boxes ── */
.result-box { margin-top: 14px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; }
.result-ok { background: #f0fdf4; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; color: #15803d; }
.result-err { background: #fef2f2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; color: #b91c1c; }

/* ── Utility ── */
.mono { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; }
.sm { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; }
</css><data_table>sp_instance</data_table><demo_data/><description/><docs/><field_list/><has_preview>false</has_preview><id>integrity-home</id><internal>false</internal><link><![CDATA[function link(scope, element, attrs, controller) {  }]]></link><name>IntegrityApp Home</name><option_schema/><public>false</public><roles/><script><![CDATA[(function() {
  var CEJO_URL = 'https://cejo-ipam.onrender.com';
  var API_KEY  = 'cejo-api-2024';
 var TABLE = 'x_1117472_integrit_u_cejo_device';

  // ── Helper: call CEJO API ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function cejoGet(path) {
    var rm = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
    rm.setEndpoint(CEJO_URL + path);
    rm.setHttpMethod('GET');
    rm.setRequestHeader('X-CEJO-API-Key', API_KEY);
    rm.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
    try {
      var r = rm.execute();
      return { status: r.getStatusCode(), body: JSON.parse(r.getBody()) };
    } catch(e) {
      return { status: 500, body: { error: e.message } };
    }
  }

  function cejoPost(path, payload) {
    var rm = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
    rm.setEndpoint(CEJO_URL + path);
    rm.setHttpMethod('POST');
    rm.setRequestHeader('X-CEJO-API-Key', API_KEY);
    rm.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
    rm.setRequestBody(JSON.stringify(payload));
    try {
      var r = rm.execute();
      return { status: r.getStatusCode(), body: JSON.parse(r.getBody()) };
    } catch(e) {
      return { status: 500, body: { error: e.message } };
    }
  }

  // ── Init: load summary + networks ─────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!input || !input.action) {
    var sumR = cejoGet('/api/v1/summary');
    var netR = cejoGet('/api/v1/networks');
    var devR = cejoGet('/api/v1/devices');

    data.summary    = sumR.status === 200 ? sumR.body : null;
    data.networks   = netR.status === 200 ? netR.body.networks : [];
    data.cejoOnline = sumR.status === 200;

    // Count by device type
    data.deviceCounts = {};
    if (devR.status === 200) {
      var devices = devR.body.devices || [];
      for (var i = 0; i < devices.length; i++) {
        var t = devices[i].device_type;
        data.deviceCounts[t] = (data.deviceCounts[t] || 0) + 1;
      }
    }
    return;
  }

  var action = input.action;

  // ── PULL ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'pull') {
    var deviceType = input.device_type;
    var r = cejoGet('/api/v1/devices');
    var all = r.status === 200 ? (r.body.devices || []) : [];

    // Filter by type
    var filtered = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < all.length; i++) {
      if (!deviceType || all[i].device_type === deviceType) {
        filtered.push(all[i]);
      }
    }

    // Filter by network if provided
    if (input.network) {
      var byNet = [];
      for (var j = 0; j < filtered.length; j++) {
        if (filtered[j].network_cidr === input.network) byNet.push(filtered[j]);
      }
      filtered = byNet;
    }

    // Save to SN table
    for (var k = 0; k < filtered.length; k++) {
      var dev = filtered[k];
      var gr = new GlideRecord(TABLE);
      gr.addQuery('u_ip_address', dev.ip);
      gr.query();
      if (!gr.next()) { gr.initialize(); }
      gr.setValue('name',           dev.name         || '');
      gr.setValue('u_cejo_name',    dev.name         || '');
      gr.setValue('u_device_type',  dev.device_type  || '');
      gr.setValue('u_ip_address',   dev.ip           || '');
      gr.setValue('u_mac_address',  dev.mac_address  || '');
      gr.setValue('u_network_cidr', dev.network_cidr || '');
      gr.setValue('u_network_name', dev.network_name || '');
      gr.setValue('u_block_name',   dev.block_name   || '');
      gr.setValue('u_owner',        dev.owner        || '');
      gr.setValue('u_description',  dev.description  || '');
      gr.setValue('u_sync_status',  'synced');
      gr.setValue('u_last_synced',  new GlideDateTime().getDisplayValue());
      if (gr.isNewRecord()) {
    gr.insert();
} else {
    gr.update();
}
    }

    data.devices = filtered;
    return;
  }

  // ── ADD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'add') {
    var form = JSON.parse(input.form || '{}');
    var deviceType = input.device_type;

    if (deviceType === 'Network') {
      // Create network in CEJO
      var r = cejoPost('/api/v1/create_network', {
        block_cidr:  form.network_cidr,
        name:        form.name,
        cidr:        form.cidr,
        vlan_id:     form.vlan_id || null,
        description: form.description || ''
      });
      if (r.status === 201) {
        data.result = { success: true, device: form.name, ip: 'N/A', mac: 'N/A' };
      } else {
        data.result = { success: false, error: r.body.error || 'Failed to create network' };
      }
    } else {
      // Add device to CEJO
      var payload = {
        network_cidr: form.network_cidr,
        name:         form.name,
        device_type:  deviceType,
        owner:        form.owner || '',
        description:  form.description || ''
      };
      if (form.ip) payload.ip = form.ip;

      var r = cejoPost('/api/v1/add_device', payload);
      if (r.status === 201) {
        // Save to SN table
        var gr = new GlideRecord(TABLE);
        gr.initialize();
        gr.setValue('name',           form.name);
        gr.setValue('u_cejo_name',    form.name);
        gr.setValue('u_device_type',  deviceType);
        gr.setValue('u_ip_address',   r.body.ip_address  || '');
        gr.setValue('u_mac_address',  r.body.mac_address || '');
        gr.setValue('u_network_cidr', form.network_cidr);
        gr.setValue('u_owner',        form.owner        || '');
        gr.setValue('u_description',  form.description  || '');
        gr.setValue('u_sync_status',  'synced');
        gr.setValue('u_last_synced',  new GlideDateTime().getDisplayValue());
        gr.insert();

        data.result = {
          success: true,
          device:  form.name,
          ip:      r.body.ip_address,
          mac:     r.body.mac_address
        };
      } else {
        data.result = { success: false, error: r.body.error || 'Failed to add device' };
      }
    }
    return;
  }

  // ── SEARCH (autosuggest) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'search') {
    var query      = (input.query || '').toLowerCase();
    var deviceType = input.device_type;
    var r = cejoGet('/api/v1/devices');
    var all = r.status === 200 ? (r.body.devices || []) : [];
    var results = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < all.length; i++) {
      var d = all[i];
      if (deviceType && d.device_type !== deviceType) continue;
      if (d.name && d.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(query) > -1) {
        results.push(d);
      }
      if (results.length >= 8) break;
    }
    data.devices = results;
    return;
  }

  // ── EDIT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'edit') {
    var form = JSON.parse(input.form || '{}');
    var ip   = input.ip_address;

    // Update in SN table
    var gr = new GlideRecord(TABLE);
    gr.addQuery('u_ip_address', ip);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) {
      gr.setValue('u_cejo_name',   form.name        || gr.getValue('u_cejo_name'));
      gr.setValue('name',          form.name        || gr.getValue('name'));
      gr.setValue('u_owner',       form.owner       || '');
      gr.setValue('u_description', form.description || '');
      gr.update();
      data.result = { success: true };
    } else {
      data.result = { success: false, error: 'Device not found in ServiceNow' };
    }
    return;
  }

  // ── DELETE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'delete') {
    var ip = input.ip_address;

    // Release from CEJO
    var r = cejoPost('/api/v1/release_ip', { ip_address: ip });

    // Delete from SN table
    var gr = new GlideRecord(TABLE);
    gr.addQuery('u_ip_address', ip);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) { gr.deleteRecord(); }

    if (r.status === 200) {
      data.result = { success: true };
    } else {
      data.result = { success: false, error: r.body.error || 'Could not release IP from CEJO' };
    }
    return;
  }

})();
]]></script><servicenow>false</servicenow><sys_class_name>sp_widget</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-18 08:43:12</sys_created_on><sys_id>855f8d8483773610f17e6750ceaad330</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>IntegrityApp Home</sys_name><sys_package display_value="IntegrityApp" source="x_1117472_integrit">775e898483773610f17e6750ceaad372</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="IntegrityApp">775e898483773610f17e6750ceaad372</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_widget_855f8d8483773610f17e6750ceaad330</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-18 09:12:22</sys_updated_on><template><![CDATA[<div class="integrity-home">

  <!-- Hero Section -->
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-content">
      <div class="hero-badge">INTEGRITY APP</div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">Network Infrastructure<br>Management Portal</h1>
      <p class="hero-sub">Manage your network devices, allocate IPs, and sync with CEJO IPAM — all in one place.</p>
      <div class="hero-stats" ng-if="c.data.summary">
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hs-val">{{c.data.summary.devices.total}}</div>
          <div class="hs-lbl">Total Devices</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat-div"></div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hs-val">{{c.data.summary.ip_addresses.available}}</div>
          <div class="hs-lbl">Available IPs</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat-div"></div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hs-val">{{c.data.summary.networks}}</div>
          <div class="hs-lbl">Networks</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-stat-div"></div>
        <div class="hero-stat">
          <div class="hs-val">{{c.data.summary.ip_addresses.utilization_pct}}%</div>
          <div class="hs-lbl">Utilization</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-visual">
      <div class="hero-ring hero-ring-1"></div>
      <div class="hero-ring hero-ring-2"></div>
      <div class="hero-ring hero-ring-3"></div>
      <div class="hero-icon-center">
        <svg width="40" height="40" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none">
          <rect x="4" y="4" width="32" height="32" rx="8" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".15"/>
          <path d="M20 8 L32 14 V26 L20 32 L8 26 V14 Z" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
          <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="4" fill="#2563eb"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search Bar -->
  <div class="search-section">
    <div class="search-wrap">
      <svg class="search-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none">
        <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5.5" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <path d="M13 13 L16 16" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
      <input class="search-inp" ng-model="c.searchQuery" placeholder="Search devices, IPs, networks...">
    </div>
    <div class="cejo-status" ng-class="{'online': c.data.cejoOnline, 'offline': !c.data.cejoOnline}">
      <div class="status-dot"></div>
      <span>CEJO IPAM {{c.data.cejoOnline ? 'Connected' : 'Offline'}}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Category Cards -->
  <div class="section-label">SELECT CATEGORY</div>
  <div class="category-grid">

    <div class="cat-card" ng-click="c.openCategory('Network')" ng-class="{'active': c.activeCategory=='Network'}">
      <div class="cat-icon-wrap cat-blue">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
          <path d="M14 3 L25 9 V21 L14 27 L3 21 V9 Z" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
          <circle cx="14" cy="15" r="3" fill="#2563eb"/>
          <path d="M14 3 V9 M14 21 V27 M3 9 L9 12 M19 18 L25 21 M3 21 L9 18 M19 12 L25 9" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-name">Networks</div>
        <div class="cat-desc">IP blocks, subnets, VLANs</div>
        <div class="cat-count" ng-if="c.data.summary">{{c.data.summary.networks}} networks</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">›</div>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-card" ng-click="c.openCategory('Computer')" ng-class="{'active': c.activeCategory=='Computer'}">
      <div class="cat-icon-wrap cat-green">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
          <rect x="3" y="5" width="22" height="15" rx="2" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
          <path d="M10 23 H18 M14 20 V23" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          <rect x="7" y="9" width="8" height="5" rx="1" fill="#16a34a" opacity=".3"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-name">Computers</div>
        <div class="cat-desc">Workstations, laptops, desktops</div>
        <div class="cat-count" ng-if="c.data.deviceCounts">{{c.data.deviceCounts.Computer || 0}} devices</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">›</div>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-card" ng-click="c.openCategory('Server')" ng-class="{'active': c.activeCategory=='Server'}">
      <div class="cat-icon-wrap cat-violet">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
          <rect x="3" y="5" width="22" height="7" rx="2" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
          <rect x="3" y="16" width="22" height="7" rx="2" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
          <circle cx="21" cy="8.5" r="1.5" fill="#7c3aed"/>
          <circle cx="21" cy="19.5" r="1.5" fill="#7c3aed"/>
          <path d="M7 8.5 H15 M7 19.5 H15" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".5"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-name">Servers</div>
        <div class="cat-desc">Application, DB, web servers</div>
        <div class="cat-count" ng-if="c.data.deviceCounts">{{c.data.deviceCounts.Server || 0}} devices</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">›</div>
    </div>

    <div class="cat-card" ng-click="c.openCategory('Router')" ng-class="{'active': c.activeCategory=='Router'}">
      <div class="cat-icon-wrap cat-amber">
        <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
          <rect x="3" y="10" width="22" height="8" rx="2" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
          <path d="M8 7 V10 M14 5 V10 M20 7 V10" stroke="#d97706" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          <circle cx="8" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="#d97706"/>
          <circle cx="14" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="#d97706"/>
          <circle cx="20" cy="14" r="1.5" fill="#d97706"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-info">
        <div class="cat-name">Routers</div>
        <div class="cat-desc">Edge, core, distribution</div>
        <div class="cat-count" ng-if="c.data.deviceCounts">{{c.data.deviceCounts.Router || 0}} devices</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-arrow">›</div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Action Panel (slides in when category selected) -->
  <div class="action-panel" ng-if="c.activeCategory" ng-animate="'slide'">

    <div class="action-panel-header">
      <div class="action-panel-title">
        <span class="ap-category-badge" ng-class="c.getCategoryClass()">{{c.activeCategory}}</span>
        <span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#111827">What would you like to do?</span>
      </div>
      <button class="ap-close" ng-click="c.activeCategory=null">✕</button>
    </div>

    <div class="action-options">

      <!-- Pull from CEJO -->
      <div class="action-opt" ng-class="{'selected': c.activeAction=='pull'}" ng-click="c.setAction('pull')">
        <div class="ao-icon ao-pull">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <path d="M10 3 V13 M6 9 L10 13 L14 9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            <path d="M3 15 H17" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-info">
          <div class="ao-title">Pull from CEJO</div>
          <div class="ao-desc">Import all {{c.activeCategory}} records from CEJO IPAM into ServiceNow</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-check" ng-if="c.activeAction=='pull'">✓</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Add New -->
      <div class="action-opt" ng-class="{'selected': c.activeAction=='add'}" ng-click="c.setAction('add')">
        <div class="ao-icon ao-add">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/>
            <path d="M10 7 V13 M7 10 H13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-info">
          <div class="ao-title">Add New</div>
          <div class="ao-desc">Register a new {{c.activeCategory}} and allocate IP/MAC from CEJO</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-check" ng-if="c.activeAction=='add'">✓</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Edit Existing -->
      <div class="action-opt" ng-class="{'selected': c.activeAction=='edit'}" ng-click="c.setAction('edit')">
        <div class="ao-icon ao-edit">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <path d="M14.5 3.5 L16.5 5.5 L7 15 L4 16 L5 13 L14.5 3.5Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-info">
          <div class="ao-title">Edit Existing</div>
          <div class="ao-desc">Search and modify an existing {{c.activeCategory}} record</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-check" ng-if="c.activeAction=='edit'">✓</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Delete -->
      <div class="action-opt action-opt-danger" ng-class="{'selected': c.activeAction=='delete'}" ng-click="c.setAction('delete')">
        <div class="ao-icon ao-delete">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none">
            <path d="M4 6 H16 M8 6 V4 H12 V6 M6 6 L7 16 H13 L14 6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-info">
          <div class="ao-title">Delete</div>
          <div class="ao-desc">Find and remove a {{c.activeCategory}} record and release its IP</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ao-check" ng-if="c.activeAction=='delete'">✓</div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- FORM AREA -->
    <div class="form-area" ng-if="c.activeAction">

      <!-- ── PULL FORM ── -->
      <div ng-if="c.activeAction=='pull'">
        <div class="form-title">Pull {{c.activeCategory}} devices from CEJO IPAM</div>
        <div class="pull-info">
          <div class="pull-info-icon">]]>📡<![CDATA[</div>
          <div>This will import all <strong>{{c.activeCategory}}</strong> devices from CEJO IPAM and save them to ServiceNow. Existing records will be updated.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Filter by Network (optional)</label>
            <select class="form-sel" ng-model="c.pullForm.network">
              <option value="">All Networks</option>
              <option ng-repeat="n in c.data.networks" value="{{n.cidr}}">{{n.name}} ({{n.cidr}})</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-actions">
          <button class="btn-primary" ng-click="c.doPull()" ng-disabled="c.loading">
            <span ng-if="c.loading" class="btn-spin"></span>
            {{c.loading ? 'Pulling...' : ']]>📥<![CDATA[ Pull ' + c.activeCategory + ' Devices'}}
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="pull-results" ng-if="c.pullResults.length > 0">
          <div class="pr-header">
            <span class="pr-count">{{c.pullResults.length}} devices pulled</span>
          </div>
          <table class="pr-table">
            <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>IP</th><th>MAC</th><th>Network</th><th>Owner</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr ng-repeat="d in c.pullResults">
                <td><strong>{{d.name}}</strong></td>
                <td class="mono">{{d.ip}}</td>
                <td class="mono sm">{{d.mac_address}}</td>
                <td class="sm">{{d.network_cidr}}</td>
                <td class="sm">{{d.owner || '—'}}</td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── ADD FORM ── -->
      <div ng-if="c.activeAction=='add'">
        <div class="form-title">Add New {{c.activeCategory}}</div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Device Name *</label>
            <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.addForm.name" placeholder="e.g. {{c.getNamePlaceholder()}}">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Network *</label>
            <select class="form-sel" ng-model="c.addForm.network_cidr">
              <option value="">— Select Network —</option>
              <option ng-repeat="n in c.data.networks" value="{{n.cidr}}">{{n.name}} ({{n.cidr}})</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" ng-if="c.activeCategory != 'Network'">
            <label class="form-label">Owner / Team</label>
            <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.addForm.owner" placeholder="e.g. IT-Ops">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" ng-if="c.activeCategory != 'Network'">
            <label class="form-label">Specific IP (optional)</label>
            <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.addForm.ip" placeholder="Auto-assign if blank">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" ng-if="c.activeCategory == 'Network'">
            <label class="form-label">CIDR *</label>
            <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.addForm.cidr" placeholder="e.g. 10.20.0.0/24">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" ng-if="c.activeCategory == 'Network'">
            <label class="form-label">VLAN ID</label>
            <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.addForm.vlan_id" type="number" placeholder="e.g. 20">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group full">
            <label class="form-label">Description</label>
            <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.addForm.description" placeholder="Brief description">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-actions">
          <button class="btn-primary" ng-click="c.doAdd()" ng-disabled="c.loading">
            <span ng-if="c.loading" class="btn-spin"></span>
            {{c.loading ? 'Adding...' : '➕ Add ' + c.activeCategory}}
          </button>
          <button class="btn-secondary" ng-click="c.resetForm()">Clear</button>
        </div>
        <div class="result-box result-ok" ng-if="c.addResult && c.addResult.success">
          ✅ <strong>{{c.addResult.device}}</strong> added! IP: <span class="mono">{{c.addResult.ip}}</span> · MAC: <span class="mono">{{c.addResult.mac}}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="result-box result-err" ng-if="c.addResult && !c.addResult.success">
          ❌ {{c.addResult.error}}
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── EDIT FORM ── -->
      <div ng-if="c.activeAction=='edit'">
        <div class="form-title">Edit {{c.activeCategory}}</div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group full">
            <label class="form-label">Search {{c.activeCategory}} *</label>
            <div class="autosuggest-wrap">
              <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.editSearch" ng-change="c.onEditSearch()" placeholder="Start typing device name..." autocomplete="off">
              <div class="autosuggest-dropdown" ng-if="c.editSuggestions.length > 0">
                <div class="as-item" ng-repeat="s in c.editSuggestions" ng-click="c.selectEditDevice(s)">
                  <strong>{{s.name}}</strong>
                  <span class="as-ip mono">{{s.ip}}</span>
                  <span class="as-net sm">{{s.network_cidr}}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Device details shown after selection -->
        <div class="selected-device-card" ng-if="c.selectedDevice">
          <div class="sdc-header">
            <div class="sdc-title">Editing: <strong>{{c.selectedDevice.name}}</strong></div>
            <div class="sdc-badges">
              <span class="sdc-badge sdc-ip">IP: {{c.selectedDevice.ip}}</span>
              <span class="sdc-badge sdc-mac">MAC: {{c.selectedDevice.mac_address}}</span>
              <span class="sdc-badge sdc-net">{{c.selectedDevice.network_cidr}}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-row" style="margin-top:16px">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Device Name</label>
              <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.editForm.name">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Owner / Team</label>
              <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.editForm.owner">
            </div>
            <div class="form-group full">
              <label class="form-label">Description</label>
              <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.editForm.description">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-actions">
            <button class="btn-primary" ng-click="c.doEdit()" ng-disabled="c.loading">
              <span ng-if="c.loading" class="btn-spin"></span>
              {{c.loading ? 'Saving...' : ']]>💾<![CDATA[ Save Changes'}}
            </button>
            <button class="btn-secondary" ng-click="c.clearSelection()">Cancel</button>
          </div>
          <div class="result-box result-ok" ng-if="c.editResult && c.editResult.success">✅ Changes saved successfully!</div>
          <div class="result-box result-err" ng-if="c.editResult && !c.editResult.success">❌ {{c.editResult.error}}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── DELETE FORM ── -->
      <div ng-if="c.activeAction=='delete'">
        <div class="form-title">Delete {{c.activeCategory}}</div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group full">
            <label class="form-label">Search {{c.activeCategory}} to delete *</label>
            <div class="autosuggest-wrap">
              <input class="form-inp" ng-model="c.deleteSearch" ng-change="c.onDeleteSearch()" placeholder="Start typing device name..." autocomplete="off">
              <div class="autosuggest-dropdown" ng-if="c.deleteSuggestions.length > 0">
                <div class="as-item" ng-repeat="s in c.deleteSuggestions" ng-click="c.selectDeleteDevice(s)">
                  <strong>{{s.name}}</strong>
                  <span class="as-ip mono">{{s.ip}}</span>
                  <span class="as-net sm">{{s.network_cidr}}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Device info shown before delete -->
        <div class="delete-preview" ng-if="c.deleteTarget">
          <div class="dp-header">
            <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none"><path d="M10 6 V10 M10 13 V14" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
            <span>You are about to delete this device and release its IP address</span>
          </div>
          <div class="dp-details">
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">Device Name</span><span class="dp-val"><strong>{{c.deleteTarget.name}}</strong></span></div>
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">Device Type</span><span class="dp-val">{{c.deleteTarget.device_type}}</span></div>
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">IP Address</span><span class="dp-val mono">{{c.deleteTarget.ip}}</span></div>
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">MAC Address</span><span class="dp-val mono">{{c.deleteTarget.mac_address}}</span></div>
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">Network</span><span class="dp-val mono">{{c.deleteTarget.network_cidr}}</span></div>
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">Owner</span><span class="dp-val">{{c.deleteTarget.owner || '—'}}</span></div>
            <div class="dp-row"><span class="dp-key">Description</span><span class="dp-val">{{c.deleteTarget.description || '—'}}</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-actions">
            <button class="btn-danger" ng-click="c.doDelete()" ng-disabled="c.loading">
              <span ng-if="c.loading" class="btn-spin"></span>
              {{c.loading ? 'Deleting...' : ']]>🗑<![CDATA[ Confirm Delete & Release IP'}}
            </button>
            <button class="btn-secondary" ng-click="c.clearDeleteSelection()">Cancel</button>
          </div>
          <div class="result-box result-ok" ng-if="c.deleteResult && c.deleteResult.success">✅ Device deleted and IP {{c.deleteTarget.ip}} released!</div>
          <div class="result-box result-err" ng-if="c.deleteResult && !c.deleteResult.success">❌ {{c.deleteResult.error}}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>
]]></template></sp_widget><sys_es_latest_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><id>855f8d8483773610f17e6750ceaad330</id><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-18 08:43:12</sys_created_on><sys_id>055f814883773610f17e6750ceaad3a7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-18 08:43:12</sys_updated_on><table>sp_widget</table><use_es_latest>true</use_es_latest></sys_es_latest_script></record_update>
